_meta.author: lovesickfromthe6ix
_meta.title: Music Reactive Hero Section
_meta.description: A modern, minimal and bold hero section with a dynamic audio reactive visualization background. Includes built in audio player with play / pause controls and beautiful post processing effects including film grain, subtle film emulation, chromatic aberration and bloom. Everything is customizable and multiple aspects, from the wave color to the film grain intensity, are reactive to the audio.
